projects.title: Skylark 1.0 Launch
projects.outcome: Skylark, the weather-journal app, live in the store as a one-time purchase with a calm launch week and no surprise regressions.
projects.next_action: Finish the TASK-044 submission dry run, then submit Skylark 1.0 (TASK-050) before the 2026-06-24 store cutoff.

project_context.purpose: Ship Skylark 1.0 with visible, sourced proof at every gate: playtest fixes folded in, pricing locked, store submission clean.
proof_loop: Record verification in the proof package
Queue a review packet before anything durable moves
usage_paths: open http://127.0.0.1:8000 for the local demo walkthrough
repo_map: sources/ holds raw truth and the catalog
project_context.privacy_boundary: Beta tester feedback stays local to the studio; only aggregated survey stats leave the machine.

daily_loop: Open Today and check the current gate
Advance the gate task in one reviewable slice
Queue a review packet for anything durable
tabs: Today = current gate and one recommended move
Projects = launch state for Skylark, website, community
Reviews = approval queue; nothing durable skips it
proof_rules: Judge launch readiness only on repo-backed visible proof
Every claim needs a source id from the catalog
Run the smoke check before showing the demo
operator_prompts: Propose the smallest next launch slice for the current gate
Draft a review packet for the pricing confirmation before TASK-058 promotion
v2_limits: No live store API connection; submission is manual
Demo weather fixtures are synthetic and deterministic
No memory writes without an approved review packet
operating_guide.likely_next_upgrade: Wire the beta survey digest into the weekly ship review routine after launch.

projects.title: Ridgeline Website & Docs
projects.outcome: ridgeline.example tells the local-first story, the docs cover the 1.0 flow, and the changelog updates itself from release notes.
projects.next_action: Rewrite the Skylark quickstart guide for the 1.0 flow with fresh screenshots (TASK-061).

projects.title: Beta Community & Support
projects.outcome: Beta testers feel heard through launch week: tickets answered inside 24 hours, themes digested weekly, survey loop feeding v1.1 scope.
projects.next_action: Finish the weekly support digest automation (TASK-073) before launch-week volume arrives.
